title: Jagannath Temple, Koraput
tagline: Jagannath Temple, Koraput — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Shri Jagannath temple(Odia: ଶ୍ରୀ ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ମନ୍ଦିର) (popularly known as "Shabara Shrikshetra") is a temple located in Koraput, Odisha, India.
overview.description: Shri Jagannath temple(Odia: ଶ୍ରୀ ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ମନ୍ଦିର) (popularly known as "Shabara Shrikshetra") is a temple located in Koraput, Odisha, India. It is not only built as an altar for worship, but also as a multipurpose area for Jagannath consciousness. Jagannath consciousness is the main theme of Jagannath which can not be confined within the limits of a traditional religious theological order, because it is a cult (or even a philosophical system). It is originated from the tribal culture, and it has no antagonism towards any religion, caste or creed, Practice of tolerance in the real life of the ind

topPlaces.name: Gorum language
topPlaces.description: Gorum (also Parengi) is a near-extinct minor Munda language of India, spoken by the Parenga people of Odisha state, eastern India.

topPlaces.name: Dumuriput
topPlaces.description: Dumuriput is a small town located in between Koraput and Sunabeda by the side of NH-43. It comes under the tahasil of Sunabeda in Koraput district of the state Odisha, India.

topPlaces.name: Damanjodi
topPlaces.description: Damanjodi is a town located in the Koraput district of Odisha, India. As of 2001 census, its population was 8,469.

topPlaces.name: Koraput
topPlaces.description: Koraput is a town and a Municipality in Koraput district in the Indian state of Odisha. Koraput town is the district headquarter of Koraput district.

items.note: Gorum (also Parengi) is a near-extinct minor Munda language of India, spoken by the Parenga people of Odisha state, eastern India.
Dumuriput is a small town located in between Koraput and Sunabeda by the side of NH-43. It comes under the tahasil of Sunabeda in Koraput district of the state Odisha, India.
Damanjodi is a town located in the Koraput district of Odisha, India. As of 2001 census, its population was 8,469.
Koraput is a town and a Municipality in Koraput district in the Indian state of Odisha. Koraput town is the district headquarter of Koraput district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jagannath Temple, Koraput?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jagannath Temple, Koraput is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jagannath Temple, Koraput?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (133 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (136 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jagannath Temple, Koraput?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jagannath Temple, Koraput at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jagannath Temple, Koraput?
faq.a: Stays in Jagannath Temple, Koraput start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jagannath Temple, Koraput?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gorum language, Dumuriput, Damanjodi, Koraput.
